description: Retroactive AI attribution for commits made before automated Co-Authored-By tracking was enabled.
note: This repository was built with ~80% AI assistance using Windsurf (Claude Opus). These commits predate the adoption of Co-Authored-By trailers.

ai_assisted_commits.message: feat: prepare AIDA for NPM publishing
chore: add changeset for initial release
chore: update packages after first @aida-dev release
fix: ESLint and Prettier configuration for monorepo
docs: update typography and refactor copy button handler
chore: enhance .gitignore with IDE, cache, and output files !
fix: apply --since/--until date filters to git log
docs: update CLI options to reflect per-command structure
feat: detect Claude Code, ChatGPT and Gemini commits
docs: update roadmap with completed milestones and attribution classification
chore: add changeset for AI detection improvements

excluded_commits.message: feat: initial AIDA metrics implementation with AI-powered analysis
docs: add Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
